/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmap_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmap_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/object_motion_type__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/object_semantic_type__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/object_shape_type__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/polygon_object__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/polygon_object_stamped__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/polygon_object_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/polygon_object_array_stamped__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/map_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/map_interfaces/msg/detail/geometric_map__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
